title: calystegia subvolubilis
intro: Calystegia subvolubilis, commonly known as the pink bindweed or pink false bindweed, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family, Convolvulaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Calystegia subvolubilis include its ability to reduce pain, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, helping to prevent cell damage. Herbal preparations of Calystegia subvolubilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
